name: io.github.luckyjackluo/cairn
title: Cairn
description: Local-first file-organization tools for AI agents: list, read, search, grep, edit, move, tag, query, and digest over .uni documents and markdown with YAML frontmatter. BYO-key, no cloud.

environmentVariables.description: Path to the folder Cairn operates on. If unset, defaults to the current working directory. You can also pass --workspace on the command line instead.
environmentVariables.name: CAIRN_WORKSPACE
